themes.name: General AI in research
themes.description: Other AI applications in research not covered by specific themes.

themes.description: AI adoption, skills, impact on work, and organizational readiness.

themes.description: AI agents and tools automating research workflows and operations.

themes.description: AI tools for designing better surveys, reducing bias, and analyzing responses.

themes.description: Chatbots, virtual assistants, and voice AI in research contexts.

themes.description: Automated data analysis, clustering, segmentation, and pattern detection.

themes.description: AI in product decisions, discovery, prioritization, and roadmapping.

themes.description: Bias, fairness, responsible AI, privacy, and trust in research.

themes.name: Interview analysis
themes.description: AI-assisted interview transcription, coding, and qualitative analysis.

note: Themes identified by analyzing articles from curated sources and Google News this month.
